text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right! Today's the All Comers!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've been doing pretty good lately, I think. It'd
sure be nice if I could win... I wonder if I can do
it...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hmph! You're late, Machitan! Late, late, late!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! But this is about the time I always show
up...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
You got here after me! That means I win the race
of who gets to the racecourse first!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I'm super turbocharged today! That means
I'm totally gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'll show you what racing really is!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
In other words, consider this a challenge—you
versus me!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: If you got that, then I'll see ya later!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Turbo really came in hot! Hm...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can let her beat me!
